agencies.name: WPP
agencies.description: World's largest advertising holding company; owns Ogilvy, Grey, VML, GroupM, AKQA, Wunderman Thompson.
agencies.notes: Owns data platform Choreograph and GroupM media tech.

agencies.name: Omnicom Group
agencies.description: Holding company owning BBDO, DDB, TBWA, OMD; data arm Annalect.

agencies.description: Holding company owning Leo Burnett, Saatchi & Saatchi, Publicis Sapient, Performics, Epsilon.

agencies.name: The Interpublic Group (IPG)
